source.title: Введение в качественный и количественный анализ химических веществ

current_certified_use.scope: Abstract definitions of fractional/systematic analysis and selectivity only.
forbidden_expansion: safety, fire, first-aid or waste instructions
personal data and report workflow from another course

binding_record_required.rule: Official publication provenance does not substitute for current-course or current-protocol approval. No operational fragment becomes student-visible until every field is populated and the version is effective.

curation_stages.output: Page-level map: definitions, theory, calculations, procedures, safety, personal data and assessment material.
Formula/unit transcription from rendered pages with source anchors and SHA-256.
Versioned mapping to a current Picrete course and approved laboratory protocol.
Frozen task contract, rubric, source set, supported chemistry_check and gold/mutation suite.
Tasks admitted without per-item teacher approval only when the full evidence gate passes.
required_evidence: two independent decision-grade DeepSeek solutions agree
subject critic passes chemistry, units, applicability and self-containment

candidate_page_policy.pages_5_7: exclude: first-aid/fire guidance from another institution
candidate_page_policy.page_10: exclude personal data and foreign course workflow
candidate_page_policy.pages_17_43: quarantine pending course/protocol binding; do not infer current procedure

exam_compilation.reason: Corrupted formulas, unsafe historical fragments, profanity and no controlled provenance/key. Only coarse topic inventory is permitted.
